title: dimorphorchis lyonii
intro: Dimorphorchis lyonii, also known as the tiger orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the forests of Borneo. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dimorphorchis lyonii include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent the growth of bacteria. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
